title: SoFi Technologies Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: SoFi Technologies has a consensus price target of $18.69 based on the ratings of 27 analysts. JPMorgan analyst Reginal Smith raised the rating on SoFi to Overweight from Neutral in February 2026, reiterating a $31 price target, suggesting roughly 40% upside from current levels. Wells Fargo initiated coverage of SoFi Technologies with an Equal-Weight recommendation on March 19, 2026. BofA Securities downgraded SoFi from Neutral to Underperform, citing concerns about the company's valuation. The high price target of $31 was issued by JP Morgan on February 3, 2026. Recent analyst downgrades followed Q1 earnings when Goldman Sachs cut its target from $20 to $17 and maintained Neutral, Morgan Stanley cut its target to $16 with Underweight, and Truist cut its target to $17. Despite mixed analyst sentiment, the consensus remains constructive with multiple analysts noting the company's strong operational performance and significant market opportunity.
